description_long: This figure depicts an adult pedestrian with a striking and unconventional appearance, featuring a detailed mask or helmet with horn-like protrusions and a high ponytail. The individual is dressed in a loose, short-sleeved shirt adorned with gold chains and a large graphic on the back, paired with knee-length shorts. Both arms are covered in tattoos and fingerless gloves, adding to the urban, street-inspired aesthetic. The lower legs are exposed, and the person wears high-top sneakers. The face is obscured by a bandana or scarf, further enhancing the mysterious and edgy look. The overall style suggests a blend of street fashion and fantasy elements, making the character stand out in any urban environment.
description: A masked adult pedestrian in urban streetwear with gold chains, tattoos, and high-top sneakers, featuring a horned helmet and a high ponytail. The figure exudes a bold, edgy, and mysterious street style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the horned helmet, bandana-covered face, gold chains, tattoos, and the full streetwear outfit.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the horned helmet, ponytail, arm tattoos, and the layered clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the high ponytail, the large graphic on the back of the shirt, and the overall silhouette.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the helmet profile, ponytail, and visible tattoos on the arm.
attribute_clothing_type: urban streetwear with a loose short-sleeved shirt, knee-length shorts, fingerless gloves, and layered accessories
attribute_hairstyle: long hair tied in a high ponytail
